# ENT-9202

Well-formed community-class entity fixture: `rendering_class: community`, all
three attestation fields, and a bare `projects_to` to a tradition-class entity.
It carries NO tradition fields and NO positioning bounds — a community entity has
an attestation window, not a founding date, and therefore no bar to draw.
